programs.title: The Waterboy
programs.desc: An American football team's waterboy puts up with constant ridicule from the players. But one day his anger gets the better of him and he demonstrates an unexpected talent for tackling - so the coach gives him a chance to prove his worth on the pitch. However, he has to keep his blossoming sporting career a secret from his overprotective mother.

programs.title: Seinfeld
programs.desc: Elaine keeps getting dragged to see the The English Patient even though she absolutely hates the film. A gorgeous woman mistakes George for her boyfriend, Neil. Jerry takes on The Mandelbaum Boys.
